runs.text: Typography is the craft of endowing human language with a durable visual form.
. The invisible nature of good typography ensures that the reader's attention is entirely focused on the message, not the medium.
stitch letters into fluid shapes, preventing awkward collisions between characters. From justified columns to careful kerning, every
the final impression on the page.
A well-designed page should invite the eye to enter the text, read without strain, and navigate easily from one section to the next.
